title: eupatorium zacuapanum
intro: Eupatorium zacuapanum, also known as Zacuapanum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Eupatorium zacuapanum include relief from arthritis, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to soothe various ailments, and is also used in traditional medicine in certain regions.
